description: An aircraft has damage that is not covered by the Structural Repair Manual. A stress engineer must analyze the damage and write a custom repair specification.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the location and extent of the damage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent fully characterizes the structural damage.

nodes.task_description: Perform a stress analysis to design a repair (e.g., a doubler plate) that restores the original strength of the structure.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent designs a repair that meets all safety and certification requirements.

nodes.task_description: Author a formal repair specification document with detailed instructions and drawings for the technicians to follow.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a clear, detailed, and compliant repair document.
